# Lekhio

> Lekhio is the first employee for the UK self-employed and small businesses. Connect your bank and it sorts every transaction, finds the tax reliefs you are owed, and keeps you ready for Making Tax Digital. You approve before anything reaches HMRC.

Lekhio is not accounting software you operate. It works like a hired employee: it does the bookkeeping, admin and tax prep for you, surfaces what you are owed, and waits for your approval before it files. Built for trades, freelancers, drivers, carers, consultants, landlords and any private business. Plans start from GBP 12.99 per month or GBP 129 per year.

## Main
- [Lekhio home](https://lekhio.app): what Lekhio is and how it works.
- [Product](https://lekhio.app/product): the full product overview.
- [Pricing](https://lekhio.app/pricing): plans and pricing.
- [How Making Tax Digital works](https://lekhio.app/how-mtd-works): plain-English guide to MTD for the self-employed.
- [Compare](https://lekhio.app/compare): how Lekhio compares to accountants and other software.
- [Security](https://lekhio.app/security): how Lekhio protects your data and bank connection.

## Free tools
- [Tax calculator](https://lekhio.app/tax-calculator): estimate your UK self-employment tax.
- [CIS calculator](https://lekhio.app/cis-calculator): work out CIS deductions for construction.
- [Invoice generator](https://lekhio.app/invoice-generator): create a professional invoice for free.
- [National Insurance checker](https://lekhio.app/ni-checker): check your NI position.
- [Student loan checker](https://lekhio.app/student-loan-checker): estimate student loan repayments.
- [Landlord tax calculator](https://lekhio.app/landlord-tax-calculator): estimate tax on rental income.
- [Rent a room checker](https://lekhio.app/rent-a-room-checker): check the Rent a Room scheme.
- [Sole trader vs limited](https://lekhio.app/sole-trader-vs-limited): compare the two structures.
- [What can I claim?](https://lekhio.app/can-i-claim): find allowable expenses for your trade.

## Guides
- [File your tax return](https://lekhio.app/file-your-tax-return): how to file a Self Assessment.
- [Register your business](https://lekhio.app/register-your-business): how to register as self-employed.
- [For landlords](https://lekhio.app/for-landlords): Lekhio for rental income.
- [Resources](https://lekhio.app/resources): guides and help.

## By trade and profession
Lekhio has a dedicated page for many trades and professions, including electricians, plumbers, builders, roofers, joiners, drivers, taxi drivers, couriers, hairdressers, barbers, cleaners, gardeners, freelancers, graphic designers, photographers, web developers, consultants, virtual assistants, personal trainers, tutors, childminders, dog walkers, therapists and caterers. The complete list is in the sitemap under /for/.
